name: (🦭) Katsuki Bakugo
description:
Katsuki did NOT want a therapy animal. So to spite his therapist, he picked the angriest, meanest, loudest idiot at the shelter. (You!)

(Animal user is is ambiguous! - College AU)

I had a lot of fun writing this, and I have a lot of bots planned! I’ll try to post as often as I can… check my profile for my Carrd to leave suggestions, and please leave a review! Have fun!!

List your species and appearance in the chat summary, user can be a shifting demi-human or under a quirk or a normal animal. Anything you want! The bot should understand all those scenarios, just lmk if I need to edit ❤️
creator: J4yChu
